zh.lifeSummary: 當John Ansell於1604年7月3日出生在英國素福爾可時，他的父親John Ansell52歲，母親Agnes Tiler50歲。他於大約1625年與Katherine Goodrich在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1654年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Ansell于1604年7月3日出生在英国素福爾可时，他的父亲John Ansell52岁，母亲Agnes Tiler50岁。他于大约1625年与Katherine Goodrich在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1654年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ansell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a vernacular form of the personal name Anselmus (ancient Germanic Anshelm, Old French Anselm). See Anselm .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Ansel  .
Swedish: from an unexplained first element + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

variants.name: Hansell
meanings: English: variant of Ansell with prosthetic H-.
In some cases probably an altered form of   Hansel   1 or 3.

variants.name: Anselm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Heinz.

English and German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Anshelm, composed of the elements ans- ‘god’ + helm ‘protection, helmet’. The personal name was taken to France and England by St. Anselm (c. 1033–1109), known as the Father of Scholasticism. He was born in Aosta, Italy, joined the Benedictine order at Bec in Normandy, France, and in 1093 became archbishop of Canterbury, England.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Ansell was born on 3 July 1604, in Suffolk, England, his father, John Ansell, was 52 and his mother, Agnes Tiler, was 50. He married Katherine Goodrich about 1625, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1654, in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 51.

Il a épousé Katherine Goodrich environ 1625, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1654, à Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ko.Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일
ko.lifeSummary: John Ansell(이)가 1604년 7월 3일 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Ansell(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Tiler(은)는 50세였다. 그는 대략 1625년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Katherine Goodrich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1654년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Katherine Goodrich aproximadamente 1625, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Ansell родился 3 июля 1604 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Ansell было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Tiler, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Goodrich около 1625 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1654 г. в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 51 год.
